name: brave-search
description: Search the web, news, and images with the privacy-focused Brave Search API, including local business and point-of-interest lookups

envVars.name: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY
envVars.description: Brave Search API subscription token from the API dashboard

tools.name: Web Search
tools.description: Search the web and get ranked results from Brave's independent index

country.description: 2-letter country code for result localization, e.g. US, DE

search_lang.description: Language code for results, e.g. en

freshness.description: Filter by discovery time: pd (24h), pw (7d), pm (31d), py (365d), or a YYYY-MM-DDtoYYYY-MM-DD range

result_filter.description: Comma-delimited result types to include, e.g. web,news,videos,locations

safesearch.description: Adult content filter: off, moderate, or strict

tools.name: News Search
tools.description: Search recent and historical news articles from trusted outlets worldwide

country.description: 2-letter country code, or ALL for worldwide

search_lang.description: Language code for results, e.g. en

freshness.description: Filter by article age: pd (24h), pw (7d), pm (31d), py (365d), or a YYYY-MM-DDtoYYYY-MM-DD range

safesearch.description: Adult content filter: off, moderate, or strict (the news endpoint's API default is strict)

historicalSummary.omitted: thumbnails, meta_url details, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Image Search
tools.description: Search Brave's image index and get image URLs with source page metadata

country.description: 2-letter country code, or ALL for worldwide

search_lang.description: Language code for results, e.g. en

safesearch.description: Adult content filter: off or strict

tools.name: Video Search
tools.description: Search for videos and get results with titles, creators, durations, and thumbnails

country.description: 2-letter country code for result localization, e.g. US, DE

search_lang.description: Language code for results, e.g. en

freshness.description: Filter by discovery date: pd (24h), pw (7d), pm (31d), py (year), or a range like 2026-04-01to2026-06-30

safesearch.description: Adult content filter: off, moderate, or strict (API default moderate)

tools.name: Get Local Descriptions
tools.description: Get AI-generated text descriptions for up to 20 locations using location IDs returned in a Web Search response's locations results

ids.description: Location IDs from a Web Search response's locations.results[].id (up to 20; IDs are valid for 8 hours)

tools.name: Get Local Places
tools.description: Get rich details (address, hours, ratings, pictures) for up to 20 locations using location IDs returned in a Web Search response's locations results

ids.description: Location IDs from a Web Search response's locations.results[].id (up to 20)

search_lang.description: Language code for results, e.g. en

prompts.title: Search the web
prompts.prompt: Search the web with Brave for a topic I provide and summarize the top results with links.

prompts.title: News briefing
prompts.prompt: Search Brave News for the latest articles on a topic I provide and give me a short briefing.

prompts.title: Find local places
prompts.prompt: Search Brave for a type of business near a location I provide and show details for the top matches.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Brave Search setup

steps.title: Create an API account
steps.description: Go to https://api-dashboard.search.brave.com and register (separate from a regular Brave account). Adding a payment method is required to activate a subscription.

steps.title: Choose a plan and get credits
steps.description: Pick a plan in the dashboard. The API is credit-based — you purchase request credits rather than getting a permanent free tier; new accounts may receive a small trial credit.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://api-dashboard.search.brave.com/app/keys and generate a subscription token for your plan.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add it to your .env file as BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Web Search tool with a simple query. A 401 means the token is invalid or sent in the wrong header (it must be X-Subscription-Token, not Authorization); a 429 means you exceeded your plan's rate limit.

notes: The API is credit/usage-based with no permanent free tier — monitor remaining credits in the dashboard
The API key goes in the X-Subscription-Token header; Authorization: Bearer will be rejected
Some endpoints (e.g. Local/POI details) are only available on higher-tier (Pro) plans
Web Search pagination is limited: count max 20 per request, offset max 9
